settings.title: How long does shipping take?
settings.text:
We ship quickly and efficiently.

  • US: 5–7 business days
  • International: 10–15 business days

settings.title: When will my order be shipped?
settings.text: All orders are processed within 1–2 business days. You’ll receive a shipping confirmation once your package is on the way.

settings.title: Do I get a tracking number?
settings.text: Yes. Every order includes tracking so you can follow your package from our door to yours.

settings.title: Do you ship internationally?
settings.text: Absolutely. We deliver worldwide. Shipping times vary depending on your location and local customs.

settings.title: What if my package is delayed or hasn’t arrived?
settings.text:
Start by checking your tracking link.

If you still need help, reach out to us — we’re here to assist.

settings.title: What is your return policy?
settings.text: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for items in original, unused condition.

settings.title: How do I request a return or exchange?
settings.text: Just contact us with your order number. Our team will guide you through a simple, hassle-free process.

settings.title: Who covers return shipping?
settings.text: Customers are responsible for return shipping fees unless the item arrived damaged or incorrect.

settings.title: When will I receive my refund?
settings.text: Once your return is received and inspected, refunds are issued within 3–5 business days.

settings.title: Can I exchange instead of returning?
settings.text: Yes. If the product is eligible, we can exchange it for another variant or item of your choice.

settings.title: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.text: We accept all major payment methods, including credit/debit cards, digital wallets, and other secure online payment options shown at checkout.

settings.title: Is my payment information secure?
settings.text: Yes. All transactions are encrypted and processed through trusted, PCI-compliant payment providers. We never store your card details.

settings.title: When will I be charged?
settings.text: Your payment is processed immediately when you complete your order.

settings.title: Do you offer installment payments?
settings.text: If available in your region, supported installment options (such as Shop Pay Installments or other services) will appear automatically at checkout.

settings.title: My payment didn’t go through. What should I do?
settings.text:
Please double-check your card details or try another payment method.
If the issue continues, contact us — we’re happy to assist.
